compiled_state.title: GREEN: Create ticket-lifecycle.yml GitHub Actions workflow
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create `.github/workflows/ticket-lifecycle.yml`:
- Trigger: cron schedule (e.g., daily at 03:00 UTC) + workflow_dispatch for manual triggering
- Job: checkout tickets branch, run ticket-lifecycle.sh
- Concurrency group: ticket-lifecycle (cancel-in-progress: false — skipped runs are safe since operations are idempotent)
- Permissions: contents: write

## File Impact
- Create: `.github/workflows/ticket-lifecycle.yml`

## TDD Exemption
Unit exemption criteria 1+2+3: YAML workflow file has no conditional logic, any test would be a change-detector, it is purely infrastructure configuration. Integration test exemption criterion 2: no sandbox for testing against the actual tickets branch.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Workflow file exists
  Verify: test -f .github/workflows/ticket-lifecycle.yml
- [ ] YAML is valid
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ticket-lifecycle.yml'))"
- [ ] Has cron trigger
  Verify: grep -q 'cron' .github/workflows/ticket-lifecycle.yml
- [ ] Has workflow_dispatch
  Verify: grep -q 'workflow_dispatch' .github/workflows/ticket-lifecycle.yml
- [ ] Has concurrency group
  Verify: grep -q 'concurrency' .github/workflows/ticket-lifecycle.yml
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: ticket-lifecycle.yml workflow created with cron + dispatch + concurrency.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
